summary: Completed backend testing of Large Wallet Performance Optimization (Iteration 16). All 8 tests passed including Solana wallet, exchange deposit detection, CSV import with per-asset FIFO gains, Form 8949 export, total_transaction_count field, and large ETH wallet (Vitalik's) analysis.

solana_small_wallet.details: Solana wallet analysis works correctly, returns valid data with recentTransactions

exchange_deposit_detection.details: Exchange deposit warning is detected for Solana wallet with detected=true flag

csv_import_fifo_gains.verification: Form 8949 CSV export shows exact expected values

form_8949_export.details: Form 8949 export returns valid CSV with correct asset labels (BTC, ETH)

total_transaction_count_field.details: Wallet analysis response includes total_transaction_count field

large_eth_wallet.details: Large ETH wallet returns results without timeout. Display truncation shows max 100 txs in recentTransactions.

seed_data_creation: Multi-asset CSV test data for FIFO verification (BTC buy/sell, ETH buy/sell)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Large wallet performance optimization working correctly: 1) Solana small wallet (7UcUr...) returns valid data, 2) Exchange deposit detection fires, 3) CSV import produces correct per-asset FIFO gains (BTC $7500, ETH -$550, total $6950), 4) Form 8949 export includes correct asset labels, 5) total_transaction_count field present in response, 6) Large ETH wallet (Vitalik's) completes in ~43s with display truncation to 100 txs. Performance improvements: EVM pagination (6000 transfers), batch gas calculation, bulk historical prices from CryptoCompare.
